cart.title: Baaskiidka
cart.addBillingAddressPrompt: Fadlan cinwaanka xisaabta ku dar si aad u sii wadato iibsigaaga.
cart.addCardPrompt: Si aad kaarka deynta u darsato, fadlan badhanka Kaar Cusub Kudar gujiso.
cart.noUnpaidInvoices: Ma jiraan qaybsasho aan la bixin.
cart.paymentActivationPrompt: Fadlan lacagta hawlgelinta adeegga bixi. Marka lacagtu la helo, adeegagaagu si deg-deg ah waa la hawlgelin doonaa.
cart.bankPaymentNote: Ka dib lacagta la bixiyo, tigidhad taageero fur oo ku jir lambarka macaamilada, taariikhda, iyo xaddiga la bixiyay. Si gacanta ah ayaan lacagta ugu darsanaa.

creditCard.name: Magaca
creditCard.verifyIntroStep1: Xaqiijinta ayaa loo baahan yahay ka hor inta aan kaarka deyntaadu isticmaalka loo diyaarin. InterServer waxay kaarka deyntaada ku shugi doontaa laba xaddi oo mid walba $1.00 ka yar.
creditCard.verifyBillingStatement: Kharashaadkaan waxay soo muuqan doonaan bayaanka xisaabeedkaaga dhowr daqiiqo gudahood, badanaa hoos amaanahda sugaysa. Haddaad kharashaadkaan arayn, fadlan la xiriir shirkadda kaarka deyntaada faahfaahin dheeraad ah.
creditCard.verifyVoidNotice: Kharashaadkan ansixinta kaliya ujeedka xaqiijinta ayaa loo isticmaalaa oo 3-5 maalmood gudahood maan-kari doontaan, bangigaaga ku xidnaanshaha.
creditCard.acceptTempCharges: Waxaan aqbalayaa laba kharash ku-meel-gaar ah oo mid walba $1.00 ka yar.
creditCard.verifyBankLogin: Bangiga internetka kaarka deyntaada ku gal ama bangigaaga wac si aad u xaqiijiso labada xaddi ee la shugay. Badanaa waxay hoos muuqdaan Kharashaadka Sugaysa bangigaaga. Kharashaadkan ansixinta waxay ka baxayaan qiyaastii 3-5 maalmood bangigaaga ku xidnaanshaha.
creditCard.enterAmountsPrompt: Fadlan geli labada xaddi ee kaarka deyntaada lagu shugay. Qiyamku waa inay USD ku jiraan.
creditCard.currencyNote: Fadlan ogow in kharashaadka bayaanka kaarka deyntaada laga yaabo inay ku jiraan lacag kala-duwan oo ka duwan tan loo baahan yahay bogga xaqiijinta ee ugu dambeysa ee sare lagu sharraxay. Haddii bayaanka kaarka deyntaadu uusan muujin xaddiyada macaamilada asalka ah ee lacagta loo baahan yahay, waa inaad la xiriirtaa shirkadda kaarka deyntaada. Waa inay kuu sheegtaa xaddiyada labada kharash ee lacagta asalka ah.
creditCard.deleteConfirm: Ma hubtaa inaad ka saareyso kaarka deyntaada {card}?
creditCard.verifiedTooltip: Kaarkaan waa la xaqiijiyay oo nidaamkayaga isticmaalka ayaa loo shaqeeysiiyay.
creditCard.enableCardTooltip: Halkan guji si aad kaarka deyntaan isticmaalka u shaqeeysiiso.

pay.title: Qaybsashada Bixo
pay.autoRedirect: Si otomaatig ah ayaad u wareegi doontaa.

paymentSuccess.title: Guulda Lacag-bixinta
paymentSuccess.thankYou: Lacag-bixintaada waad ku mahadsan tahay. Macaamiladaadu si guul leh ayay u dhamaatay.

paymentTypes.title: Noocyada Lacag-bixinta
paymentTypes.ccNote: Dhammaan karooyinka deynta waa in la xaqiijiyaa ka hor intaan la isticmaalin. Si aad u xaqiijiso, badhanka "Xaqiiji" gujiso.
paymentTypes.selectPreferredMethod: Habka Lacag-bixinta ee La Doorbiday Dooro
paymentTypes.deleteInvoiceConfirm: Ma hubtaa inaad tirtiri doonto qaybsashadaada {id}?

prepays.title: Lacagta Hordhac-bixinta
prepays.showingPage: Bogga {page} ka {totalPages} iyo {records} diiwaankood ka {totalRecords} waa la muujinayaa
prepays.deletePrepayConfirm: Ma hubtaa inaad tirtiri doonto hordhac-bixintaada #{id} iyo taariikhdeeda la xidhmay?
